title: September 16, 2021: Nutrition Science Advisory Committee: Agenda - Canada.ca
content:
## Nutrition Science Advisory Committee (NSAC): Fourth Meeting Agenda
- Review and approve the Record of Proceedings from the third meeting
- Discuss and provide advice on how food and nutrition monitoring can become more responsive to observe changes in drivers
Nutrition Science Advisory Committee Fourth Meeting: September 16, 2021
Welcome & Declarations of Affiliations and Interests Led by NSAC Co-Chairs
Approval of Record of Proceedings from Third Meeting Led by NSAC Co-Chairs
Monitoring to discern and understand new and emerging trends impacting the nutritional health of Canadians: Bridging Theme 2: How to be more responsive in monitoring Presenters: NSAC Co-Chairs
Monitoring to discern and understand new and emerging trends impacting the nutritional health of Canadians: Bridging Theme 2: How to be more responsive in monitoring
Presenters: NSAC Co-Chairs
Virtual Armchair Discussion: How to be more responsive in monitoring Presenters: Sylvain Tremblay, Assistant Director, Centre for Population Health Data, Statistics Canada including a 10 min discussion with the presenter

- including a 10 min discussion with the presenter

Focused discussion Led by NSAC Co-Chairs
Closing Remarks Led by NSAC Co-Chairs
